title: Knowledge base
description: Retrieves existing static and evolutive knowledge about the user

documents.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, filename TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP)

chunks.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chunks (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, docstore_id TEXT, type INTEGER, content TEXT, reason TEXT, theme TEXT, tags TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP, document_id INTEGER, conversation_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(document_id) REFERENCES documents(id), FOREIGN KEY(conversation_id) REFERENCES conversation_threads(id))
